HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering

7#include "SommerfeldIntegrator.h"
8#include <algorithm>
9#include <numeric>
10#include <unordered_map>
11
12/* ----------------------------
13 * File-scope state for QUADPACK callbacks
14 * (QUADPACK expects function pointers; we memoize per-abscissa results
15 * and use globals to select which member (TE/TM/derivatives) to return.)
16 * ----------------------------
17 * File-static utility variables for the Gauss-Kronrod integration,
18 * since no lambda function can be called as a pointer if it
19 * captures references in c++11:
20 * ----------------------------
21 */
22static SommerfeldIntegrator* g_integ = nullptr;
23static std::vector<dcmplx> g_rq_te;
24static std::vector<dcmplx> g_rq_tm;
25static dcmplx g_tq_te;
26static dcmplx g_tq_tm;
27static Data2D g_Data2D;
28static Data3D g_Data3D;
29static IntegrandIntra g_intZeroKrho;
30static IntegrandInter g_intZeroKrhoInter;
31static double g_k_max = 0.0;
32static std::string g_path = "none";
33static size_t g_currentI = 0;
34static size_t g_currentJ = 0;
35static size_t g_currentK = 0;
36static std::string g_op = "";
37
39enum class IntraMember {
40 TE, TM, TEZ, TMZ,
41 TEZZ, TMZZ, TES, TMS,
42 TER, TMR, TERZ, TMRZ
43};
44
46enum class InterMember {
47 TE, TM, TEZ1, TMZ1, TEZ2, TMZ2,
48 TEZZ, TMZZ, TES, TMS, TER, TMR,
49 TERZ1, TMRZ1, TERZ2, TMRZ2
50};
51
52static IntraMember g_currentMember = IntraMember::TE;
53static InterMember g_currentMemberInter = InterMember::TE;
54
56static std::map<double, IntegrandIntra> g_memo;
57
59static std::unordered_map<double, IntegrandInter> g_memoInter;
60
62std::string g_status = "";
63
64// ----------------------------
65// QUADPACK callback selectors
66// ----------------------------
78extern "C" double pickRealMember(double* x)
79{
80 dcmplx c(0.0, 0.0);
81 if (g_status == "inter") {
82 // Check if we already have IntegrandInter computed for x
83 auto it = g_memoInter.find(*x);
84 if (it == g_memoInter.end())
85 {
86 // Not found in cache -> Evaluate the entire integrand at x
87 IntegrandInter val = g_integ->integrationFInter(
88 g_tq_te, g_tq_tm, g_Data3D, *x, g_k_max, g_intZeroKrhoInter, g_path
89 );
90
91 // Store in cache
92 it = g_memoInter.emplace(*x, std::move(val)).first;
93 }
94
95 // Now "it->second" is the cached IntegrandInter
96 const IntegrandInter &val = it->second;
97
98 // Pick the correct (member, i, j, k)
99 switch (g_currentMemberInter) {
100 case InterMember::TE: c = val.te[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
101 case InterMember::TM: c = val.tm[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
102 case InterMember::TEZ1: c = val.tez1[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
103 case InterMember::TMZ1: c = val.tmz1[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
104 case InterMember::TEZ2: c = val.tez2[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
105 case InterMember::TMZ2: c = val.tmz2[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
106 case InterMember::TEZZ: c = val.tezz[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
107 case InterMember::TMZZ: c = val.tmzz[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
108 case InterMember::TES: c = val.tes[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
109 case InterMember::TMS: c = val.tms[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
110 case InterMember::TER: c = val.ter[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
111 case InterMember::TMR: c = val.tmr[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
112 case InterMember::TERZ1: c = val.terz1[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
113 case InterMember::TMRZ1: c = val.tmrz1[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
114 case InterMember::TERZ2: c = val.terz2[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
115 case InterMember::TMRZ2: c = val.tmrz2[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
116 }
117 } else if (g_status == "intra"){
118 // Check if we already have IntegrandIntra computed for x
119 auto it = g_memo.find(*x);
120 if (it == g_memo.end())
121 {
122 // Not found in cache -> Evaluate the entire integrand at x
123 IntegrandIntra val = g_integ->integrationFIntra(
124 g_rq_te, g_rq_tm, g_Data2D, *x, g_k_max, g_intZeroKrho, g_path, g_op
125 );
126
127 // Store in the map
128 g_memo[*x] = val;
129 it = g_memo.find(*x); // "it" now points to the newly inserted element
130 }
131
132 // Now "it->second" is the cached IntegrandIntra
133 const IntegrandIntra &val = it->second;
134
135 // Pick the correct (member, i, j)
136 switch (g_currentMember) {
137 case IntraMember::TE: c = val.te[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
138 case IntraMember::TM: c = val.tm[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
139 case IntraMember::TEZ: c = val.tez[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
140 case IntraMember::TMZ: c = val.tmz[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
141 case IntraMember::TEZZ: c = val.tezz[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
142 case IntraMember::TMZZ: c = val.tmzz[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
143 case IntraMember::TES: c = val.tes[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
144 case IntraMember::TMS: c = val.tms[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
145 case IntraMember::TER: c = val.ter[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
146 case IntraMember::TMR: c = val.tmr[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
147 case IntraMember::TERZ: c = val.terz[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
148 case IntraMember::TMRZ: c = val.tmrz[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
149 }
150 } else {
151 throw std::invalid_argument("Invalid status. Use 'intra' or 'inter'.");
152 }
153 return std::real(c);
154}
155
167extern "C" double pickImagMember(double* x)
168{
169 dcmplx c(0.0, 0.0);
170 if (g_status == "inter") {
171 // Check if we already have IntegrandInter computed for x
172 auto it = g_memoInter.find(*x);
173 if (it == g_memoInter.end())
174 {
175 // Not found in cache -> Evaluate the entire integrand at x
176 IntegrandInter val = g_integ->integrationFInter(
177 g_tq_te, g_tq_tm, g_Data3D, *x, g_k_max, g_intZeroKrhoInter, g_path
178 );
179
180 // Store in cache
181 it = g_memoInter.emplace(*x, std::move(val)).first;
182 }
183
184 // Now "it->second" is the cached IntegrandIntra
185 const IntegrandInter &val = it->second;
186
187 // Pick the correct (member, i, j, k)
188 switch (g_currentMemberInter) {
189 case InterMember::TE: c = val.te[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
190 case InterMember::TM: c = val.tm[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
191 case InterMember::TEZ1: c = val.tez1[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
192 case InterMember::TMZ1: c = val.tmz1[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
193 case InterMember::TEZ2: c = val.tez2[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
194 case InterMember::TMZ2: c = val.tmz2[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
195 case InterMember::TEZZ: c = val.tezz[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
196 case InterMember::TMZZ: c = val.tmzz[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
197 case InterMember::TES: c = val.tes[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
198 case InterMember::TMS: c = val.tms[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
199 case InterMember::TER: c = val.ter[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
200 case InterMember::TMR: c = val.tmr[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
201 case InterMember::TERZ1: c = val.terz1[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
202 case InterMember::TMRZ1: c = val.tmrz1[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
203 case InterMember::TERZ2: c = val.terz2[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
204 case InterMember::TMRZ2: c = val.tmrz2[g_currentI][g_currentJ][g_currentK]; break;
205 }
206 } else if (g_status == "intra"){
207 // Check if we already have IntegrandIntra computed for x
208 auto it = g_memo.find(*x);
209 if (it == g_memo.end())
210 {
211 // Not found in cache -> Evaluate the entire integrand at x
212 IntegrandIntra val = g_integ->integrationFIntra(
213 g_rq_te, g_rq_tm, g_Data2D, *x, g_k_max, g_intZeroKrho, g_path, g_op
214 );
215
216 // Store in the map
217 g_memo[*x] = val;
218 it = g_memo.find(*x); // "it" now points to the newly inserted element
219 }
220
221 // Now "it->second" is the cached IntegrandIntra
222 const IntegrandIntra &val = it->second;
223
224 // Pick the correct (member, i, j)
225 switch (g_currentMember) {
226 case IntraMember::TE: c = val.te[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
227 case IntraMember::TM: c = val.tm[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
228 case IntraMember::TEZ: c = val.tez[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
229 case IntraMember::TMZ: c = val.tmz[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
230 case IntraMember::TEZZ: c = val.tezz[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
231 case IntraMember::TMZZ: c = val.tmzz[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
232 case IntraMember::TES: c = val.tes[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
233 case IntraMember::TMS: c = val.tms[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
234 case IntraMember::TER: c = val.ter[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
235 case IntraMember::TMR: c = val.tmr[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
236 case IntraMember::TERZ: c = val.terz[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
237 case IntraMember::TMRZ: c = val.tmrz[g_currentI][g_currentJ]; break;
238 }
239 } else {
240 throw std::invalid_argument("Invalid status. Use 'intra' or 'inter'.");
241 }
242 return std::imag(c);
243}
244
245// ----------------------------
246// External Fortran routines for Bessel/Hankel functions,
247// and Gauss-Kronrod numerical integration.
248// ----------------------------
249extern "C" {
265 void zbesj_(const double* zr, const double* zi,
266 const double* fnu, const int* kode, const int* n,
267 double* cyr, double* cyi, int* nz, int* ierr);
268
285 void zbesh_(const double* zr, const double* zi,
286 const double* fnu, const int* kode, const int* m, const int* n,
287 double* cyr, double* cyi, int* nz, int* ierr);
288
312 void dqage_(double (*f)(double *), double *a, double *b,
313 double *epsabs, double *epsrel, int *key, int *limit,
314 double *result, double *abserr, int *neval, int *ier,
315 double *alist, double *blist, double *rlist, double *elist,
316 int *iord, int *last);
317}
318
319// ----------------------------
320// Special functions / integrator wrapper
321// ----------------------------
328dcmplx besselJ(int order, dcmplx arg) {
329 // Large-argument shortcut
330 if (std::abs(arg) >= 32768.0) {
331 return sqrt(2.0 / (M_PI * arg)) * cos(arg - order * M_PI / 2.0 - M_PI / 4.0);
332 }
333
334 const double zr = std::real(arg), zi = std::imag(arg);
335 const double fnu = static_cast<double>(order);
336 const int n = 1, kode = 1; // unscaled
337 double cyr = 0.0, cyi = 0.0;
338 int nz = 0, ierr = 0;
339
340 zbesj_(&zr, &zi, &fnu, &kode, &n, &cyr, &cyi, &nz, &ierr);
341 if (ierr != 0) {
342 std::cerr << "AMOS ZBESJ error: ierr=" << ierr
343 << " for J_" << order << "(" << arg << ")\n";
344 }
345 return dcmplx(cyr, cyi);
346}
347
355dcmplx hankelH(int order, int kind, dcmplx arg) {
356 // Large-argument shortcut
357 if (std::abs(arg) >= 32768.0) {
358 if (kind == 1) {
359 return sqrt(2.0 / (M_PI * arg)) * exp( I * (arg - order * M_PI / 2.0 - M_PI / 4.0));
360 } else { // kind == 2
361 return sqrt(2.0 / (M_PI * arg)) * exp(-I * (arg - order * M_PI / 2.0 - M_PI / 4.0));
362 }
363 }
364
365 const double zr = std::real(arg), zi = std::imag(arg);
366 const double fnu = static_cast<double>(order);
367 const int n = 1, kode = 1;
368 const int m = (kind == 2 ? 2 : 1); // 1 -> H^(1), 2 -> H^(2)
369 double cyr = 0.0, cyi = 0.0;
370 int nz = 0, ierr = 0;
371
372 zbesh_(&zr, &zi, &fnu, &kode, &m, &n, &cyr, &cyi, &nz, &ierr);
373 if (ierr != 0) {
374 std::cerr << "AMOS ZBESH error: ierr=" << ierr
375 << " for H_" << (m==1?"(1)":"(2)") << order << "(" << arg << ")\n";
376 }
377 return dcmplx(cyr, cyi);
378}
379
391dcmplx gaussKronrod(double (*integrand)(double*), double a, double b,
392 int key = 5, int limit = 100,
393 double epsabs = 1e-6, double epsrel = 1e-6)
394{
395 // QUADPACK expects key in [1..6] -> 15,21,31,41,51,61 (51 <-> 25/51 pair)
396 int KEY = std::max(1, std::min(6, key));
397 int LIMIT = std::max(1, limit);
398
399 // Workspaces
400 std::vector<double> ALIST(LIMIT), BLIST(LIMIT), RLIST(LIMIT), ELIST(LIMIT);
401 std::vector<int> IORD(LIMIT);
402
403 // Outputs
404 double result = 0.0, abserr = 0.0;
405 int neval = 0, last = 0, ier = 0;
406
407 dqage_(integrand, &a, &b, &epsabs, &epsrel, &KEY, &LIMIT,
408 &result, &abserr, &neval, &ier,
409 ALIST.data(), BLIST.data(), RLIST.data(), ELIST.data(),
410 IORD.data(), &last);
411
412 if (ier != 0) {
413 std::cerr << "[QUADPACK DQAG] ier=" << ier
414 << " result=" << result
415 << " abserr=" << abserr
416 << " neval=" << neval
417 << " last=" << last << "\n";
418 }
419
420 // Return result with error in imag part
421 return dcmplx(result, abserr);
422}
423
424// ----------------------------
425// Interpolation helpers (packing)
426// ----------------------------
439std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>, std::vector<int>,
440 std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>>
441interpolateIntra(std::vector<double>& x_grid, std::vector<double>& y_grid,
442 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>& green)
443{
444 const int mx = static_cast<int>(x_grid.size());
445 const int my = static_cast<int>(y_grid.size());
446
447 // Flatten F to Fortran column-major: first index (x) runs fastest
448 std::vector<dcmplx> F_flat(mx * my);
449 for (int j = 0; j < my; ++j) // y index (slow)
450 for (int i = 0; i < mx; ++i) // x index (fast)
451 F_flat[i + j*mx] = green[i][j];
452
453 // Carry grid boundaries as complex (imag=0) to fit existing tuple type
454 std::vector<double> Xc(mx), Yc(my);
455 for (int i = 0; i < mx; ++i) Xc[i] = x_grid[i];
456 for (int j = 0; j < my; ++j) Yc[j] = y_grid[j];
457
458 // px/py vectors store counts (mx,my) for both real/imag branches
459 std::vector<int> px{mx, mx}, py{my, my};
460
461 return std::make_tuple(std::move(F_flat), std::move(px), std::move(py),
462 std::move(Xc), std::move(Yc));
463}
464
478std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>>
479interpolateInter(std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& x,
480 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& y,
481 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& z,
482 std::vector<double>& inScales,
483 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& green)
484{
485 if (x.empty() || x[0].empty() || x[0][0].empty())
486 throw std::runtime_error("Error: Input arrays for interpolation cannot be empty.");
487
488 const int mx = static_cast<int>(x.size());
489 const int my = static_cast<int>(x[0].size());
490 const int mz = static_cast<int>(x[0][0].size());
491
492 // 1D axes (assumed rectilinear tensor grid)
493 std::vector<double> Xv(mx), Yv(my), Zv(mz);
494 for (int i = 0; i < mx; ++i) Xv[i] = inScales[0] * x[i][0][0];
495 for (int j = 0; j < my; ++j) Yv[j] = inScales[1] * y[0][j][0];
496 for (int k = 0; k < mz; ++k) Zv[k] = inScales[2] * z[0][0][k];
497
498 // Column-major flattening: i (x) fastest, then j (y), then k (z)
499 std::vector<dcmplx> F_flat(mx * my * mz);
500 for (int k = 0; k < mz; ++k)
501 for (int j = 0; j < my; ++j)
502 for (int i = 0; i < mx; ++i)
503 F_flat[i + j*mx + k*mx*my] = green[i][j][k];
504
505 return std::make_tuple(std::move(Xv), std::move(Yv), std::move(Zv), std::move(F_flat));
506}
507
508// ------------------------------------------------
509// Constructors & Destructor
510// ------------------------------------------------
511SommerfeldIntegrator::SommerfeldIntegrator(const std::vector<dcmplx> inLayeredK, int inMaterialIndex,
512 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilonMedium,
513 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMuMedium,
514 const std::vector<double>& inZValsInterfaces,
515 const std::vector<double>& inThickness,
516 double inSemiReal, double inSemiImag,
517 double inRatio, double inCutoff)
518 : k_L(inLayeredK), materialIndex(inMaterialIndex), epsilon(inEpsilonMedium), mu(inMuMedium),
519 zValsInterfaces(inZValsInterfaces), thickness(inThickness), semiReal(inSemiReal),
520 semiImag(inSemiImag), ratio(inRatio), cutoff(inCutoff) {
521 layeredUtils = new LayeredMediaUtils(k_L, epsilon, mu, zValsInterfaces, thickness);
522 }
523
524SommerfeldIntegrator::SommerfeldIntegrator(const std::vector<dcmplx> inLayeredK,
525 int inMaterialIndex, int inSourceIndex,
526 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilonMedium,
527 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMuMedium,
528 const std::vector<double>& inZValsInterfaces,
529 const std::vector<double>& inThickness,
530 double inSemiReal, double inSemiImag,
531 double inRatio, double inCutoff)
532 : k_L(inLayeredK), materialIndex(inMaterialIndex), sourceIndex(inSourceIndex),
533 epsilon(inEpsilonMedium), mu(inMuMedium), zValsInterfaces(inZValsInterfaces),
534 thickness(inThickness), semiReal(inSemiReal), semiImag(inSemiImag),
535 ratio(inRatio), cutoff(inCutoff) {
536 layeredUtils = new LayeredMediaUtils(k_L, epsilon, mu, zValsInterfaces, thickness);
537 }
538
539SommerfeldIntegrator::~SommerfeldIntegrator() {
540 delete layeredUtils; // Free allocated memory
541 layeredUtils = nullptr;
542}
543
544// ----------------------------
545// Data selectors
546// ----------------------------
553Data2D SommerfeldIntegrator::selectData2D(const std::vector<std::vector<double>>& r,
554 const std::vector<std::vector<double>>& z1,
555 const std::vector<std::vector<double>>& z2,
556 const std::string& path) {
557 Data2D data;
558 if (z2.empty()) {
559 data.z2Vec.clear();
560 data.z2Matrix.clear();
561 }
562
563 if (path == "semi") {
564 data.rMatrix.resize(r.size(), std::vector<double>(r[0].size(), 0.0));
565 data.z1Matrix.resize(z1.size(), std::vector<double>(z1[0].size(), 0.0));
566 data.rMatrix = r; data.rVec.clear();
567 data.z1Matrix = z1; data.z1Vec.clear();
568 if (!z2.empty()) {
569 data.z2Matrix.resize(z2.size(), std::vector<double>(z2[0].size(), 0.0));
570 data.z2Matrix = z2; data.z2Vec.clear();
571 }
572 data.indVec.resize(r.size() * r[0].size());
573 // Fill indices with 0, 1, ..., r.size() * r[0].size() - 1
574 std::iota(data.indVec.begin(), data.indVec.end(), 0);
575 data.indVecComplex.clear();
576 } else if (path == "real") {
577 data.rVec.clear(); data.z1Vec.clear(); data.z2Vec.clear();
578 data.rMatrix.clear(); data.z1Matrix.clear(); data.z2Matrix.clear();
579 data.indVec.clear(); data.indVecComplex.clear();
580 for (size_t j = 0; j < r[0].size(); ++j) {
581 for (size_t i = 0; i < r.size(); ++i) {
582 if (z2.empty() && z1[i][j] >= this->ratio * r[i][j]) {
583 data.rVec.push_back(r[i][j]);
584 data.z1Vec.push_back(z1[i][j]);
585 data.indVecComplex.push_back(std::complex<int>(i, j));
586 } else if (!z2.empty() && z1[i][j] + z2[i][j] >= this->ratio * r[i][j]) {
587 data.rVec.push_back(r[i][j]);
588 data.z1Vec.push_back(z1[i][j]);
589 data.z2Vec.push_back(z2[i][j]);
590 data.indVecComplex.push_back(std::complex<int>(i, j));
591 }
592 }
593 }
594 } else if (path == "imag") {
595 data.rVec.clear(); data.z1Vec.clear(); data.z2Vec.clear();
596 data.rMatrix.clear(); data.z1Matrix.clear(); data.z2Matrix.clear();
597 data.indVec.clear(); data.indVecComplex.clear();
598 for (size_t j = 0; j < r[0].size(); ++j) {
599 for (size_t i = 0; i < r.size(); ++i) {
600 if (z2.empty() && z1[i][j] < this->ratio * r[i][j]) {
601 data.rVec.push_back(r[i][j]);
602 data.z1Vec.push_back(z1[i][j]);
603 data.indVecComplex.push_back(std::complex<int>(i, j));
604 } else if (!z2.empty() && z1[i][j] + z2[i][j] < this->ratio * r[i][j]) {
605 data.rVec.push_back(r[i][j]);
606 data.z1Vec.push_back(z1[i][j]);
607 data.z2Vec.push_back(z2[i][j]);
608 data.indVecComplex.push_back(std::complex<int>(i, j));
609 }
610 }
611 }
612 } else {
613 throw std::invalid_argument("Invalid path type. Use 'semi', 'real', or 'imag'.");
614 }
615
616 return data;
617}
618
623Data3D SommerfeldIntegrator::selectData3D(
624 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& r,
625 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& z1,
626 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& z2,
627 const std::string& path)
628{
629 Data3D data;
630 if (path == "semi") {
631 data.rMatrix.resize(r.size(),
632 std::vector<std::vector<double>>(r[0].size(),
633 std::vector<double>(r[0][0].size(), 0.0)));
634 data.z1Matrix.resize(z1.size(),
635 std::vector<std::vector<double>>(z1[0].size(),
636 std::vector<double>(z1[0][0].size(), 0.0)));
637 data.z2Matrix.resize(z2.size(),
638 std::vector<std::vector<double>>(z2[0].size(),
639 std::vector<double>(z2[0][0].size(), 0.0)));
640 data.rMatrix = r; data.rVec.clear();
641 data.z1Matrix = z1; data.z1Vec.clear();
642 data.z2Matrix = z2; data.z2Vec.clear();
643 data.indVec.resize(r.size() * r[0].size() * r[0][0].size());
644 // Fill indices with 0, 1, ..., r.size() * r[0].size() * r[0][0].size() - 1
645 std::iota(data.indVec.begin(), data.indVec.end(), 0);
646 data.indVecTriplet.clear();
647 } else if (path == "real") {
648 data.rVec.clear(); data.z1Vec.clear(); data.z2Vec.clear();
649 data.rMatrix.clear(); data.z1Matrix.clear(); data.z2Matrix.clear();
650 data.indVec.clear(); data.indVecTriplet.clear();
651 for (size_t k = 0; k < r[0][0].size(); ++k) {
652 for (size_t j = 0; j < r[0].size(); ++j) {
653 for (size_t i = 0; i < r.size(); ++i) {
654 if (std::abs(z1[i][j][k] - z2[i][j][k]) >= this->ratio * r[i][j][k]) {
655 data.rVec.push_back(r[i][j][k]);
656 data.z1Vec.push_back(z1[i][j][k]);
657 data.z2Vec.push_back(z2[i][j][k]);
658 data.indVecTriplet.emplace_back(i, j, k);
659 }
660 }
661 }
662 }
663 } else if (path == "imag") {
664 data.rVec.clear(); data.z1Vec.clear(); data.z2Vec.clear();
665 data.rMatrix.clear(); data.z1Matrix.clear(); data.z2Matrix.clear();
666 data.indVec.clear(); data.indVecTriplet.clear();
667 for (size_t k = 0; k < r[0][0].size(); ++k) {
668 for (size_t j = 0; j < r[0].size(); ++j) {
669 for (size_t i = 0; i < r.size(); ++i) {
670 if (std::abs(z1[i][j][k] - z2[i][j][k]) < this->ratio * r[i][j][k]) {
671 data.rVec.push_back(r[i][j][k]);
672 data.z1Vec.push_back(z1[i][j][k]);
673 data.z2Vec.push_back(z2[i][j][k]);
674 data.indVecTriplet.emplace_back(i, j, k);
675 }
676 }
677 }
678 }
679 } else {
680 throw std::invalid_argument("Invalid path type. Use 'semi', 'real', or 'imag'.");
681 }
682
683 return data;
684}
685
686// Shift z distances to nearest interface (sign via direction).
687std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>
688SommerfeldIntegrator::interDist(std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> z,
689 int index, double direction) {
690 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> result;
691 size_t rows = z.size();
692 size_t cols = z[0].size();
693 size_t depth = z[0][0].size();
694
695 if (direction == 1.0) {
696 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
697 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
698 for (size_t k = 0; k < depth; k++) {
699 z[i][j][k] -= this->zValsInterfaces[index - 1];
700 }
701 }
702 }
703 } else {
704 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
705 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
706 for (size_t k = 0; k < depth; k++) {
707 z[i][j][k] = this->zValsInterfaces[index] - z[i][j][k];
708 }
709 }
710 }
711 }
712 return z;
713}
714
715// ----------------------------
716// Secondary waves (inter-layer)
717// ----------------------------
718// Compose inter-layer secondary fields and their Z-derivatives for TE/TM.
719std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>>
720SommerfeldIntegrator::Secondary(dcmplx krho,
721 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> r,
722 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> z1,
723 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> z2,
724 const std::string& waves)
725{
726 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> f, fZ1, fZ2, fZZ;
727
728 // Coefficients for TE/TM secondary waves
729 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> waveSec =
730 this->layeredUtils->Secondary(krho, this->materialIndex, this->sourceIndex, waves);
731
732 // Wavenumber z-component for observation and source layers of inter-layer calculations
733 dcmplx kz1 = this->k_L[this->materialIndex]; kz1 = sqrt(kz1 * kz1 - krho * krho);
734 dcmplx kz2 = this->k_L[this->sourceIndex]; kz2 = sqrt(kz2 * kz2 - krho * krho);
735 if (std::imag(kz1) < 0) kz1 = -kz1; // Ensure positive imaginary part
736 if (std::imag(kz2) < 0) kz2 = -kz2; // Ensure positive imaginary part
737
738 size_t rows = r.size();
739 size_t cols = r[0].size();
740 size_t depth = r[0][0].size();
741
742 // Initialize the result structure components
743 f.assign( rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth, dcmplx(0.0, 0.0) ) ) );
744 fZ1.assign(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth, dcmplx(0.0, 0.0) ) ) );
745 fZ2.assign(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth, dcmplx(0.0, 0.0) ) ) );
746 fZZ.assign(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth, dcmplx(0.0, 0.0) ) ) );
747
748 std::vector<double> dir = {1.0, -1.0}; // Direction of the waves
749
750 for (int ii = 0; ii < waveSec.extent(0); ++ii) { // Rows
751 for (int jj = 0; jj < waveSec.extent(1); ++jj) {
752 // factor matrix for calculations
753 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> fac;
754 fac.assign(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth, dcmplx(0.0, 0.0) ) ) );
755
756 // Define directions for the waves
757 double dir1 = dir[ii]; if (materialIndex == 0) dir1 = -1.0;
758 double dir2 = dir[jj]; if (sourceIndex == zValsInterfaces.size()) dir2 = -1.0;
759
760 // Distance to interfaces
761 auto distZ1 = this->interDist(z1, materialIndex, dir1);
762 auto distZ2 = this->interDist(z2, sourceIndex, -dir2);
763
764 // Add up secondary fields
765 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
766 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
767 for (size_t k = 0; k < depth; k++) {
768 fac[i][j][k] = I * waveSec(ii, jj) *
769 exp(I * (kz1 * distZ1[i][j][k] + kz2 * distZ2[i][j][k]) ) /
770 (4 * M_PI * kz2);
771 f[i][j][k] += fac[i][j][k];
772
773 // z-derivatives
774 fZ1[i][j][k] = fZ1[i][j][k] + I * kz1 * dir1 * fac[i][j][k];
775 fZ2[i][j][k] = fZ2[i][j][k] - I * kz2 * dir2 * fac[i][j][k];
776 fZZ[i][j][k] = fZZ[i][j][k] + kz1 * dir1 * kz2 * dir2 * fac[i][j][k];
777 }
778 }
779 }
780 }
781 }
782
783 return {f, fZ1, fZ2, fZZ};
784}
785
786// ----------------------------
787// Intra-/Inter-layer integrands
788// ----------------------------
797IntegrandIntra SommerfeldIntegrator::IntraIntegrand(const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_te,
798 const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_tm,
799 const Data2D& inData2D, dcmplx kr, dcmplx kz,
800 const std::string& mode, const std::string& op) {
801 std::vector<std::vector<double>> r, z;
802
803 // Check if the input data is vectorial or tensorial and convert to 2D arrays
804 if (inData2D.rMatrix.empty() && inData2D.z1Matrix.empty())
805 {
806 // Convert rVec, z1Vec to Nx1 2D arrays.
807 size_t N = inData2D.rVec.size();
808 if (N != inData2D.z1Vec.size()) {
809 // Handle error or throw an exception if mismatch
810 throw std::runtime_error("rVec and z1Vec must have the same size");
811 }
812
813 r.resize(N, std::vector<double>(1));
814 z.resize(N, std::vector<double>(1));
815
816 for (size_t i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
817 r[i][0] = inData2D.rVec[i];
818 z[i][0] = inData2D.z1Vec[i];
819 }
820 } else if (inData2D.rVec.empty() && inData2D.z1Vec.empty()) {
821 r = inData2D.rMatrix;
822 z = inData2D.z1Matrix;
823 } else {
824 // Handle error or throw an exception if mismatch
825 throw std::runtime_error("Data2D structure empty or mismatched");
826 }
827 size_t rows = r.size();
828 size_t cols = r[0].size();
829
830 // Initialize output structure
831 IntegrandIntra interIntra;
832
833 // Green function elements for K term in the final system
834 interIntra.te.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
835 interIntra.tm.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
836 // First derivative along z, subtract quasistatic contribution
837 interIntra.tez.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
838 interIntra.tmz.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
839 // Second derivative along z
840 interIntra.tezz.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
841 interIntra.tmzz.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
842 // Surface Green function, Chew (6.28)
843 interIntra.tes.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
844 interIntra.tms.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
845 // Green function elements for D term in the final system, radial derivative
846 interIntra.ter.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
847 interIntra.tmr.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
848 // Mixed derivatives
849 interIntra.terz.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
850 interIntra.tmrz.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
851
852 // Compute Bessel or Hankel functions
853 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> z0, z1;
854 z0.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
855 z1.resize(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
856
857 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; ++i) {
858 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; ++j) {
859 if (mode == "bessel") {
860 z0[i][j] = besselJ(0, kr * r[i][j]);
861 z1[i][j] = besselJ(1, kr * r[i][j]);
862 } else if (mode == "hankel") {
863 z0[i][j] = hankelH(0, 1, kr * r[i][j]);
864 z1[i][j] = hankelH(1, 1, kr * r[i][j]);
865 }
866 }
867 }
868
869 if (op == "") {
870 // Compute Green function elements
871 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> f0(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
872 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> f1(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
873 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> f0q(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
874 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> f1q(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
875
876 dcmplx q = sqrt(-kr * kr); // For quasistatic approximation
877 if (std::imag(q) < 0) q = -q; // Ensure positive imaginary part
878 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; ++i) {
879 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; ++j) {
880 // Integrand w/o reflection coefficients
881 f0[i][j] = I * exp(I * kz * z[i][j]) / (4.0 * M_PI * kz) * z0[i][j];
882 f1[i][j] = I * exp(I * kz * z[i][j]) / (4.0 * M_PI * kz) * z1[i][j];
883 // Quasistatic approximation
884 f0q[i][j] = I * exp(I * q * z[i][j]) / (4.0 * M_PI) * z0[i][j];
885 f1q[i][j] = I * exp(I * q * z[i][j]) / (4.0 * M_PI) * z1[i][j] *
886 double(this->layeredUtils->sgn<double>(std::real(kr)));
887 }
888 }
889
890 // Compute generalized reflection coefficients
891 dcmplx r_te, r_tm;
892 double dir = 0.0;
893 if (materialIndex == 0) {
894 std::vector<dcmplx> teRT(this->layeredUtils->totalFresnelCoeffs(kr, "TE", "up"));
895 std::vector<dcmplx> tmRT(this->layeredUtils->totalFresnelCoeffs(kr, "TM", "up"));
896 r_te = teRT[0]; r_tm = tmRT[0]; dir = -1.0;
897 } else {
898 std::vector<dcmplx> teRT(this->layeredUtils->totalFresnelCoeffs(kr, "TE", "down"));
899 std::vector<dcmplx> tmRT(this->layeredUtils->totalFresnelCoeffs(kr, "TM", "down"));
900 r_te = teRT[0]; r_tm = tmRT[0]; dir = 1.0;
901 }
902
903 // Compute Green function elements
904 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; ++i) {
905 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; ++j) {
906 // Green function elements for K term in the final system
907 interIntra.te[i][j] = r_te * f0[i][j];
908 interIntra.tm[i][j] = r_tm * f0[i][j];
909 // First derivative along z, subtract quasistatic contribution
910 interIntra.tez[i][j] = dir * (I * kz * r_te * f0[i][j] - I * rq_te[0] * f0q[i][j]);
911 interIntra.tmz[i][j] = dir * (I * kz * r_tm * f0[i][j] - I * rq_tm[0] * f0q[i][j]);
912 // Second derivative along z
913 interIntra.tezz[i][j] = -kz * kz * r_te * f0[i][j] + q * rq_te[0] * f0q[i][j];
914 interIntra.tmzz[i][j] = -kz * kz * r_tm * f0[i][j] + q * rq_tm[0] * f0q[i][j];
915 // Surface Green function, Chew (6.28)
916 interIntra.tes[i][j] = kr * kr * r_te * f0[i][j] + q * rq_te[0] * f0q[i][j];
917 interIntra.tms[i][j] = kr * kr * r_tm * f0[i][j] + q * rq_tm[0] * f0q[i][j];
918 // Green function elements for D term in the final system, radial derivative
919 interIntra.ter[i][j] = -kr * r_te * f1[i][j] - I * rq_te[0] * f1q[i][j];
920 interIntra.tmr[i][j] = -kr * r_tm * f1[i][j] - I * rq_tm[0] * f1q[i][j];
921 // Mixed derivatives
922 interIntra.terz[i][j] = dir * (-I * kz * kr * r_te * f1[i][j] + q * rq_te[0] * f1q[i][j]);
923 interIntra.tmrz[i][j] = dir * (-I * kz * kr * r_tm * f1[i][j] + q * rq_tm[0] * f1q[i][j]);
924 }
925 }
926 } else {
927 // Layer thickness
928 double thick = thickness[this->materialIndex - 1];
929
930 // Compute Green function elements
931 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> f1(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
932 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> f2(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
933 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> f1q(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
934 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> f2q(rows, std::vector<dcmplx>(cols));
935
936 dcmplx q = sqrt(-kr * kr); // For quasistatic approximation
937 if (std::imag(q) < 0) q = -q; // Ensure positive imaginary part
938 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; ++i) {
939 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; ++j) {
940 // Up- and downgoing waves
941 f1[i][j] = I * exp(I * kz * z[i][j]) / (4.0 * M_PI * kz);
942 f2[i][j] = I * exp(I * kz * (2.0 * thick - z[i][j])) / (4.0 * M_PI * kz);
943 // Quasistatic approximation
944 f1q[i][j] = I * exp(I * q * z[i][j]) / (4.0 * M_PI);
945 f2q[i][j] = I * exp(I * q * (2.0 * thick - z[i][j])) / (4.0 * M_PI);
946 }
947 }
948 double s = double(this->layeredUtils->sgn<double>(std::real(kr)));
949
950 // Secondary waves
951 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> waveSecTE =
952 this->layeredUtils->Secondary(kr, this->materialIndex, this->materialIndex, "TE");
953 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> waveSecTM =
954 this->layeredUtils->Secondary(kr, this->materialIndex, this->materialIndex, "TM");
955
956 if (op == "minus") {
957 // Compute Green function elements
958 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; ++i) {
959 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; ++j) {
960 // Green function elements for K term in the final system
961 interIntra.te[i][j] = (waveSecTE(0,0) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTE(1,1) * f2[i][j]) * z0[i][j];
962 interIntra.tm[i][j] = (waveSecTM(0,0) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTM(1,1) * f2[i][j]) * z0[i][j];
963 // First derivative along z, subtract quasistatic contribution
964 interIntra.tez[i][j] = I * kz * (waveSecTE(0,0) * f1[i][j] - waveSecTE(1,1) * f2[i][j]) * z0[i][j];
965 interIntra.tmz[i][j] = I * kz * (waveSecTM(0,0) * f1[i][j] - waveSecTM(1,1) * f2[i][j]) * z0[i][j];
966 // Second derivative along z
967 interIntra.tezz[i][j] = -kz * kz * (waveSecTE(0,0) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTE(1,1) * f2[i][j] ) * z0[i][j];
968 interIntra.tmzz[i][j] = -kz * kz * (waveSecTM(0,0) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTM(1,1) * f2[i][j] ) * z0[i][j];
969 // Surface Green function, Chew (6.28)
970 interIntra.tes[i][j] = kr * kr * (waveSecTE(0,0) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTE(1,1) * f2[i][j] ) * z0[i][j];
971 interIntra.tms[i][j] = kr * kr * (waveSecTM(0,0) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTM(1,1) * f2[i][j] ) * z0[i][j];
972 // Green function elements for D term in the final system, radial derivative
973 interIntra.ter[i][j] = -kr * (waveSecTE(0,0) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTE(1,1) * f2[i][j] ) * z1[i][j];
974 interIntra.tmr[i][j] = -kr * (waveSecTM(0,0) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTM(1,1) * f2[i][j] ) * z1[i][j];
975 // Mixed derivatives
976 interIntra.terz[i][j] = -I * kz * kr * (waveSecTE(0,0) * f1[i][j] - waveSecTE(1,1) * f2[i][j] ) * z1[i][j];
977 interIntra.tmrz[i][j] = -I * kz * kr * (waveSecTM(0,0) * f1[i][j] - waveSecTM(1,1) * f2[i][j] ) * z1[i][j];
978 }
979 }
980 } else if (op == "plus") {
981 // Compute Green function elements
982 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; ++i) {
983 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; ++j) {
984 // Green function elements for K term in the final system
985 interIntra.te[i][j] = (waveSecTE(0,1) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTE(1,0) * f2[i][j]) * z0[i][j];
986 interIntra.tm[i][j] = (waveSecTM(0,1) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTM(1,0) * f2[i][j]) * z0[i][j];
987 // First derivative along z, subtract quasistatic contribution
988 interIntra.tez[i][j] = I * kz * (waveSecTE(0,1) * f1[i][j] - waveSecTE(1,0) * f2[i][j]) * z0[i][j] -
989 I * (rq_te[0] * f1q[i][j] - rq_te[1] * f2q[i][j]) * z0[i][j];
990 interIntra.tmz[i][j] = I * kz * (waveSecTM(0,1) * f1[i][j] - waveSecTM(1,0) * f2[i][j]) * z0[i][j] -
991 I * (rq_tm[0] * f1q[i][j] - rq_tm[1] * f2q[i][j]) * z0[i][j];
992 // Second derivative along z
993 interIntra.tezz[i][j] = -kz * kz * (waveSecTE(0,1) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTE(1,0) * f2[i][j] ) * z0[i][j] +
994 q * (rq_te[0] * f1q[i][j] + rq_te[1] * f2q[i][j]) * z0[i][j];
995 interIntra.tmzz[i][j] = -kz * kz * (waveSecTM(0,1) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTM(1,0) * f2[i][j] ) * z0[i][j] +
996 q * (rq_tm[0] * f1q[i][j] + rq_tm[1] * f2q[i][j]) * z0[i][j];
997 // Surface Green function, Chew (6.28)
998 interIntra.tes[i][j] = kr * kr * (waveSecTE(0,1) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTE(1,0) * f2[i][j] ) * z0[i][j] +
999 q * (rq_te[0] * f1q[i][j] + rq_te[1] * f2q[i][j] ) * z0[i][j];
1000 interIntra.tms[i][j] = kr * kr * (waveSecTM(0,1) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTM(1,0) * f2[i][j] ) * z0[i][j] +
1001 q * (rq_tm[0] * f1q[i][j] + rq_tm[1] * f2q[i][j] ) * z0[i][j];
1002 // Green function elements for D term in the final system, radial derivative
1003 interIntra.ter[i][j] = -kr * (waveSecTE(0,1) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTE(1,0) * f2[i][j] ) * z1[i][j] -
1004 I * s * (rq_te[0] * f1q[i][j] + rq_te[1] * f2q[i][j] ) * z1[i][j];
1005 interIntra.tmr[i][j] = -kr * (waveSecTM(0,1) * f1[i][j] + waveSecTM(1,0) * f2[i][j] ) * z1[i][j] -
1006 I * s * (rq_tm[0] * f1q[i][j] + rq_tm[1] * f2q[i][j] ) * z1[i][j];
1007 // Mixed derivatives
1008 interIntra.terz[i][j] = -I * kz * kr * (waveSecTE(0,1) * f1[i][j] - waveSecTE(1,0) * f2[i][j] ) * z1[i][j] +
1009 q * s * (rq_te[0] * f1q[i][j] - rq_te[1] * f2q[i][j] ) * z1[i][j];
1010 interIntra.tmrz[i][j] = -I * kz * kr * (waveSecTM(0,1) * f1[i][j] - waveSecTM(1,0) * f2[i][j] ) * z1[i][j] +
1011 q * s * (rq_tm[0] * f1q[i][j] - rq_tm[1] * f2q[i][j] ) * z1[i][j];
1012 }
1013 }
1014 } else {
1015 // Handle error or throw an exception if mismatch
1016 throw std::runtime_error("Wrong type for intra-layer Green's function calcularions: use 'plus' or 'minus'.");
1017 }
1018 }
1019
1020 return interIntra;
1021}
1022
1031IntegrandInter SommerfeldIntegrator::InterIntegrand(const dcmplx& tq_te, const dcmplx& tq_tm,
1032 const Data3D& inData3D, dcmplx kr,
1033 const std::string& mode) {
1034 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> r, z1, z2;
1035
1036 // Check if the input data is vectorial or tensorial and convert to 2D arrays
1037 if (inData3D.rMatrix.empty() && inData3D.z1Matrix.empty() && inData3D.z2Matrix.empty())
1038 {
1039 // Convert rVec, z1Vec to Nx1 2D arrays.
1040 size_t N = inData3D.rVec.size();
1041 if (N != inData3D.z1Vec.size() || N != inData3D.z2Vec.size()) {
1042 // Handle error or throw an exception if mismatch
1043 throw std::runtime_error("rVec and z1Vec must have the same size");
1044 }
1045
1046 r.resize( N, std::vector<std::vector<double>>(1, std::vector<double>(1)));
1047 z1.resize(N, std::vector<std::vector<double>>(1, std::vector<double>(1)));
1048 z2.resize(N, std::vector<std::vector<double>>(1, std::vector<double>(1)));
1049
1050 for (size_t i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
1051 r[i][0][0] = inData3D.rVec[i];
1052 z1[i][0][0] = inData3D.z1Vec[i];
1053 z2[i][0][0] = inData3D.z2Vec[i];
1054 }
1055 } else if (inData3D.rVec.empty() && inData3D.z1Vec.empty() && inData3D.z2Vec.empty()) {
1056 r = inData3D.rMatrix;
1057 z1 = inData3D.z1Matrix;
1058 z2 = inData3D.z2Matrix;
1059 } else {
1060 // Handle error or throw an exception if mismatch
1061 throw std::runtime_error("Data3D structure empty or mismatched");
1062 }
1063 size_t rows = r.size();
1064 size_t cols = r[0].size();
1065 size_t depth = r[0][0].size();
1066
1067 // Initialize output structure
1068 IntegrandInter interInter;
1069
1070 // Green function elements for K term in the final system
1071 interInter.te.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1072 interInter.tm.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1073 // First derivative along z, subtract quasistatic contribution
1074 interInter.tez1.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1075 interInter.tez2.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1076 interInter.tmz1.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1077 interInter.tmz2.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1078 // Second derivative along z
1079 interInter.tezz.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1080 interInter.tmzz.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1081 // Surface Green function, Chew (6.28)
1082 interInter.tes.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1083 interInter.tms.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1084 // Green function elements for D term in the final system, radial derivative
1085 interInter.ter.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1086 interInter.tmr.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1087 // Mixed derivatives
1088 interInter.terz1.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1089 interInter.terz2.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1090 interInter.tmrz1.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1091 interInter.tmrz2.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1092
1093 // Compute Bessel or Hankel functions
1094 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> b0, b1;
1095 b0.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1096 b1.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1097
1098 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; ++i) {
1099 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; ++j) {
1100 for (size_t k = 0; k < depth; ++k) {
1101 if (mode == "bessel") {
1102 b0[i][j][k] = besselJ(0, kr * r[i][j][k]);
1103 b1[i][j][k] = besselJ(1, kr * r[i][j][k]);
1104 } else if (mode == "hankel") {
1105 b0[i][j][k] = hankelH(0, 1, kr * r[i][j][k]);
1106 b1[i][j][k] = hankelH(1, 1, kr * r[i][j][k]);
1107 }
1108 }
1109 }
1110 }
1111
1112 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>> fAll;
1113 fAll = this->Secondary(kr, r, z1, z2, "TE");
1114 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> fTE = fAll[0], fTEZ1 = fAll[1];
1115 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> fTEZ2 = fAll[2], fTEZZ = fAll[3];
1116 fAll = this->Secondary(kr, r, z1, z2, "TM");
1117 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> fTM = fAll[0], fTMZ1 = fAll[1];
1118 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> fTMZ2 = fAll[2], fTMZZ = fAll[3];
1119
1120 // Propagation direction of reflected waves and propagation distance
1121 double dir = this->layeredUtils->sgn<double>(double(materialIndex - sourceIndex));
1122 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> Z;
1123 Z.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<double>>(cols, std::vector<double>(depth)));
1124 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; ++i) {
1125 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; ++j) {
1126 for (size_t k = 0; k < depth; ++k) {
1127 Z[i][j][k] = std::abs(z1[i][j][k] - z2[i][j][k]);
1128 }
1129 }
1130 }
1131
1132 // Compute Green function elements
1133 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> f0q, f1q;
1134 f0q.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1135 f1q.resize(rows, std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>(cols, std::vector<dcmplx>(depth)));
1136
1137 dcmplx q = sqrt(-kr * kr); // For quasistatic approximation
1138 if (std::imag(q) < 0) q = -q; // Ensure positive imaginary part
1139 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; ++i) {
1140 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; ++j) {
1141 for (size_t k = 0; k < depth; ++k) {
1142 // Up- and downgoing waves
1143 f0q[i][j][k] = I * exp(I * q * Z[i][j][k]) / (4.0 * M_PI) * b0[i][j][k];
1144 f1q[i][j][k] = I * exp(I * q * Z[i][j][k]) / (4.0 * M_PI) * b1[i][j][k] *
1145 ( double(this->layeredUtils->sgn<double>( std::real(kr) ) ) );
1146 }
1147 }
1148 }
1149 // Compute Green function elements
1150 for (size_t i = 0; i < rows; ++i) {
1151 for (size_t j = 0; j < cols; ++j) {
1152 for (size_t k = 0; k < depth; ++k) {
1153 // Green function elements for K term in the final system
1154 interInter.te[i][j][k] = fTE[i][j][k] * b0[i][j][k];
1155 interInter.tm[i][j][k] = fTM[i][j][k] * b0[i][j][k];
1156 // First derivative along z, subtract quasistatic contribution
1157 interInter.tez1[i][j][k] = fTEZ1[i][j][k] * b0[i][j][k] - I * dir * tq_te * f0q[i][j][k];
1158 interInter.tmz1[i][j][k] = fTMZ1[i][j][k] * b0[i][j][k] - I * dir * tq_tm * f0q[i][j][k];
1159 interInter.tez2[i][j][k] = fTEZ2[i][j][k] * b0[i][j][k] + I * dir * tq_te * f0q[i][j][k];
1160 interInter.tmz2[i][j][k] = fTMZ2[i][j][k] * b0[i][j][k] + I * dir * tq_tm * f0q[i][j][k];
1161 // Second derivative along z
1162 interInter.tezz[i][j][k] = fTEZZ[i][j][k] * b0[i][j][k] - q * tq_te * f0q[i][j][k];
1163 interInter.tmzz[i][j][k] = fTMZZ[i][j][k] * b0[i][j][k] - q * tq_tm * f0q[i][j][k];
1164 // Surface Green function, Chew (6.28)
1165 interInter.tes[i][j][k] = kr * kr * fTE[i][j][k] * b0[i][j][k] + q * tq_te * f0q[i][j][k];
1166 interInter.tms[i][j][k] = kr * kr * fTM[i][j][k] * b0[i][j][k] + q * tq_tm * f0q[i][j][k];
1167 // Green function elements for D term in the final system, radial derivative
1168 interInter.ter[i][j][k] = -kr * fTE[i][j][k] * b1[i][j][k] - I * tq_te * f1q[i][j][k];
1169 interInter.tmr[i][j][k] = -kr * fTM[i][j][k] * b1[i][j][k] - I * tq_tm * f1q[i][j][k];
1170 // Mixed derivatives
1171 interInter.terz1[i][j][k] = -kr * fTEZ1[i][j][k] * b1[i][j][k] + dir * q * tq_te * f1q[i][j][k];
1172 interInter.tmrz1[i][j][k] = -kr * fTMZ1[i][j][k] * b1[i][j][k] + dir * q * tq_tm * f1q[i][j][k];
1173 interInter.terz2[i][j][k] = -kr * fTEZ2[i][j][k] * b1[i][j][k] - dir * q * tq_te * f1q[i][j][k];
1174 interInter.tmrz2[i][j][k] = -kr * fTMZ2[i][j][k] * b1[i][j][k] - dir * q * tq_tm * f1q[i][j][k];
1175 }
1176 }
1177 }
1178 return interInter;
1179}
1180
1181// ----------------------------
1182// One-abscissa drivers w/ subtraction
1183// ----------------------------
1184// Integration function for internal intra-layer Sommerfeld integrals.
1185IntegrandIntra SommerfeldIntegrator::integrationFIntra(const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_te,
1186 const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_tm,
1187 const Data2D& inData, double x, double k_max,
1188 const IntegrandIntra& intZeroKrho,
1189 const std::string& path, const std::string& op) {
1190 IntegrandIntra result;
1191 dcmplx k_layer = this->k_L[materialIndex];
1192 double a = this->cutoff *
1193 std::real( k_layer / ( sqrt( this->epsilon[materialIndex] * this->mu[materialIndex] ) ) );
1194
1195 // Integration along semi-ellipse
1196 if (path == "semi") {
1197 // krho parametric form
1198 dcmplx kr = k_max * (1.0 - cos(x) - I * this->semiImag * sin(x));
1199
1200 // krho parametric form derivative w.r.t. x
1201 dcmplx dkr_dx = k_max * (sin(x) - I * this->semiImag * cos(x));
1202
1203 // kz of the layer
1204 dcmplx kz = sqrt(k_layer * k_layer - kr * kr);
1205 if (std::imag(kz) < 0) kz = -kz;
1206
1207 // Compute the integrand
1208 IntegrandIntra intSemi = IntraIntegrand(rq_te, rq_tm, inData, kr, kz, "bessel", op);
1209 dcmplx factorSemi = dkr_dx / kr;
1210 intSemi = factorSemi * intSemi;
1211
1212 // Singularity subtraction
1213 factorSemi = dkr_dx / kr * a * a / (a * a + kr * kr);
1214 result = intSemi - factorSemi * intZeroKrho;
1215 }
1216 // Integration to real infinity
1217 else if (path == "real") {
1218 // krho parametric form
1219 dcmplx kr = 2.0 * k_max / x;
1220
1221 // krho parametric form derivative w.r.t. x
1222 dcmplx dkr_dx = -2.0 * k_max / (x * x);
1223
1224 // kz of the layer
1225 dcmplx kz = sqrt(k_layer * k_layer - kr * kr);
1226 if (std::imag(kz) < 0) kz = -kz;
1227
1228 // Select the corresponding data for the integration path
1229 IntegrandIntra intZeroKrhoReal = intZeroKrho.flatten(inData.indVecComplex);
1230
1231 // Compute the integrand
1232 IntegrandIntra intReal = IntraIntegrand(rq_te, rq_tm, inData, kr, kz, "bessel", op);
1233 dcmplx factorReal = dkr_dx / kr;
1234 intReal = factorReal * intReal;
1235 factorReal = dkr_dx / kr * (a * a) / (a * a + kr * kr);
1236
1237 // Singularity subtraction
1238 result = intReal - factorReal * intZeroKrhoReal;
1239 }
1240
1241 // Integration to imaginary infinity
1242 else if (path == "imag") {
1243 // krho parametric form
1244 dcmplx kr1 = 2.0 * k_max * ( 1.0 - I + I / x);
1245 dcmplx kr2 = 2.0 * k_max * (-1.0 - I + I / x);
1246
1247 // krho parametric form derivative w.r.t. x
1248 dcmplx dkr_dx = -2.0 * I * k_max / (x * x);
1249
1250 // kz of the layer
1251 dcmplx kz1 = sqrt(k_layer * k_layer - kr1 * kr1); if (std::imag(kz1) < 0) kz1 = -kz1;
1252 dcmplx kz2 = sqrt(k_layer * k_layer - kr2 * kr2); if (std::imag(kz2) < 0) kz2 = -kz2;
1253
1254 // Select the corresponding data for the integration path
1255 IntegrandIntra intZeroKrhoImag = intZeroKrho.flatten(inData.indVecComplex);
1256
1257 // Compute the integrands
1258 IntegrandIntra intImag1 = IntraIntegrand(rq_te, rq_tm, inData, kr1, kz1, "hankel", op);
1259 IntegrandIntra intImag2 = IntraIntegrand(rq_te, rq_tm, inData, kr2, kz2, "hankel", op);
1260 dcmplx factorImag1 = 0.5 * dkr_dx / kr1;
1261 dcmplx factorImag2 = 0.5 * dkr_dx / kr2;
1262
1263 IntegrandIntra intImag = factorImag1 * intImag1 - factorImag2 * intImag2;
1264 factorImag1 = dkr_dx / kr1 * (a * a) / (a * a + kr1 * kr1);
1265 factorImag2 = dkr_dx / kr2 * (a * a) / (a * a + kr2 * kr2);
1266
1267 // Singularity subtraction
1268 result = intImag - (factorImag1 - factorImag2) * intZeroKrhoImag;
1269 }
1270 // Invalid path type
1271 else {
1272 throw std::invalid_argument("Invalid path type. Use 'semi', 'real', or 'imag'.");
1273 }
1274
1275 return result;
1276}
1277
1278// Integration function for inter-layer Sommerfeld integrals.
1279IntegrandInter SommerfeldIntegrator::integrationFInter(const dcmplx& tq_te, const dcmplx& tq_tm,
1280 const Data3D& inData, double x, double k_max,
1281 const IntegrandInter& intZeroKrho,
1282 const std::string& path) {
1283 IntegrandInter result;
1284 dcmplx k_layer = this->k_L[materialIndex];
1285 double a = this->cutoff *
1286 std::real( k_layer / ( sqrt( this->epsilon[materialIndex] * this->mu[materialIndex] ) ) );
1287
1288 // Integration along semi-ellipse
1289 if (path == "semi") {
1290 // krho parametric form
1291 dcmplx kr = k_max * (1.0 - cos(x) - I * this->semiImag * sin(x));
1292
1293 // krho parametric form derivative w.r.t. x
1294 dcmplx dkr_dx = k_max * (sin(x) - I * this->semiImag * cos(x));
1295
1296 // Compute the integrand
1297 IntegrandInter intSemi = InterIntegrand(tq_te, tq_tm, inData, kr, "bessel");
1298 dcmplx factorSemi = dkr_dx / kr;
1299 intSemi = factorSemi * intSemi;
1300
1301 // Singularity subtraction
1302 factorSemi = dkr_dx / kr * a * a / (a * a + kr * kr);
1303 result = intSemi - factorSemi * intZeroKrho;
1304 }
1305 // Integration to real infinity
1306 else if (path == "real") {
1307 // krho parametric form
1308 dcmplx kr = 2.0 * k_max / x;
1309
1310 // krho parametric form derivative w.r.t. x
1311 dcmplx dkr_dx = -2.0 * k_max / (x * x);
1312
1313 // Select the corresponding data for the integration path
1314 IntegrandInter intZeroKrhoReal = intZeroKrho.flatten(inData.indVecTriplet);
1315
1316 // Compute the integrand
1317 IntegrandInter intReal = InterIntegrand(tq_te, tq_tm, inData, kr, "bessel");
1318 dcmplx factorReal = dkr_dx / kr;
1319 intReal = factorReal * intReal;
1320 factorReal = dkr_dx / kr * (a * a) / (a * a + kr * kr);
1321
1322 // Singularity subtraction
1323 result = intReal - factorReal * intZeroKrhoReal;
1324 }
1325
1326 // Integration to imaginary infinity
1327 else if (path == "imag") {
1328 // krho parametric form
1329 dcmplx kr1 = 2.0 * k_max * ( 1.0 - I + I / x);
1330 dcmplx kr2 = 2.0 * k_max * (-1.0 - I + I / x);
1331
1332 // krho parametric form derivative w.r.t. x
1333 dcmplx dkr_dx = -2.0 * I * k_max / (x * x);
1334
1335 // Select the corresponding data for the integration path
1336 IntegrandInter intZeroKrhoImag = intZeroKrho.flatten(inData.indVecTriplet);
1337
1338 // Compute the integrands
1339 IntegrandInter intImag1 = InterIntegrand(tq_te, tq_tm, inData, kr1, "hankel");
1340 IntegrandInter intImag2 = InterIntegrand(tq_te, tq_tm, inData, kr2, "hankel");
1341 dcmplx factorImag1 = 0.5 * dkr_dx / kr1;
1342 dcmplx factorImag2 = 0.5 * dkr_dx / kr2;
1343
1344 IntegrandInter intImag = factorImag1 * intImag1 - factorImag2 * intImag2;
1345 factorImag1 = dkr_dx / kr1 * (a * a) / (a * a + kr1 * kr1);
1346 factorImag2 = dkr_dx / kr2 * (a * a) / (a * a + kr2 * kr2);
1347
1348 // Singularity subtraction
1349 result = intImag - (factorImag1 - factorImag2) * intZeroKrhoImag;
1350 }
1351 // Invalid path type
1352 else {
1353 throw std::invalid_argument("Invalid path type. Use 'semi', 'real', or 'imag'.");
1354 }
1355
1356 return result;
1357}
1358
1367std::vector<double> getColumn(const std::vector<std::vector<double>>& matrix, size_t colIndex) {
1368 std::vector<double> column(matrix.size()); // Preallocate space
1369 std::transform(matrix.begin(), matrix.end(), column.begin(),
1370 [colIndex](const std::vector<double>& row) { return row[colIndex]; });
1371 return column;
1372}
1373
1383std::vector<double> getColumnAtRowDepth(
1384 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& matrix,
1385 size_t rowIndex, size_t depthIndex)
1386{
1387 if (rowIndex >= matrix.size()) {
1388 throw std::out_of_range("Row index out of range.");
1389 }
1390
1391 std::vector<double> rowAtDepth;
1392 for (const auto& col : matrix[rowIndex]) {
1393 if (depthIndex >= col.size()) {
1394 throw std::out_of_range("Depth index out of range.");
1395 }
1396 rowAtDepth.push_back(col[depthIndex]); // Extract the element at specified depth
1397 }
1398 return rowAtDepth;
1399}
1400
1410std::vector<double> getDepthAtRowColumn(
1411 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& matrix,
1412 size_t rowIndex, size_t colIndex)
1413{
1414 if (rowIndex >= matrix.size() || colIndex >= matrix[rowIndex].size()) {
1415 throw std::out_of_range("Row or column index out of range.");
1416 }
1417
1418 return matrix[rowIndex][colIndex]; // Extract the entire depth slice
1419}
1420
1430std::vector<double> getRowAtColumnDepth(
1431 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& matrix,
1432 size_t colIndex, size_t depthIndex)
1433{
1434 std::vector<double> columnAtDepth;
1435 for (const auto& row : matrix) {
1436 if (colIndex >= row.size() || depthIndex >= row[colIndex].size()) {
1437 throw std::out_of_range("Column or depth index out of range.");
1438 }
1439 columnAtDepth.push_back(row[colIndex][depthIndex]); // Extract element
1440 }
1441 return columnAtDepth;
1442}
1443
1444// Sommerfeld integral evaluation methods for (all) the intra-layer integrals.
1445CoeffsIntra SommerfeldIntegrator::Evaluate(const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_te,
1446 const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_tm,
1447 const std::vector<std::vector<double>>& r,
1448 const std::vector<std::vector<double>>& z,
1449 bool singular, const std::string& op) {
1450 // Validate singular parameter
1451 if (singular == false) {
1452 throw std::invalid_argument("Invalid value for singular parameter. Must be true.");
1453 } else {
1454 // Get the layers wavenumbers
1455 std::vector<dcmplx> k = k_L;
1456
1457 // Material index layer wavenumber
1458 dcmplx k_layer = k[materialIndex];
1459
1460 // Maximum layer real part of wavenumbers
1461 dcmplx temp = *std::max_element(k.begin(), k.end(), [](const dcmplx& a, const dcmplx& b) {
1462 return std::real(a) < std::real(b);
1463 });
1464 double k_max = this->semiReal * std::real(temp);
1465
1466 // Select data for integration paths of semiellipse, and real or imaginary infinity
1467 auto dataSemi2D = selectData2D(r, z, {}, "semi");
1468 auto dataReal2D = selectData2D(r, z, {}, "real");
1469 auto dataImag2D = selectData2D(r, z, {}, "imag");
1470
1471 // Integrand for krho = 0
1472 IntegrandIntra intZeroKrho = IntraIntegrand(rq_te, rq_tm, dataSemi2D,
1473 dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), k_layer, "bessel", op);
1474
1475 // alpha parameter for singularity subtraction Chew (Ch.6, A-7)
1476 double alpha = this->cutoff * std::real( k_layer / ( sqrt( this->epsilon[materialIndex] *
1477 this->mu[materialIndex] ) ) );
1478
1479 // Set the global pointers/variables needed by the function:
1480 g_integ = this; g_rq_te = rq_te; g_rq_tm = rq_tm;
1481 g_status = "intra"; g_k_max = k_max; g_op = op;
1482 g_intZeroKrho = intZeroKrho;
1483
1484 // Numerical integration structure to define the size of the numerical integration results and store them
1485 IntegrandIntra numIntSemi = integrationFIntra(rq_te, rq_tm, dataSemi2D, 0.5, k_max, intZeroKrho, "semi", op);
1486
1487 // Semi-ellipse integration path
1488 g_memo.clear();
1489 g_Data2D = dataSemi2D;
1490 g_path = "semi";
1491
1492 // Loop over the members of the IntegrandIntra structure
1493 for (IntraMember mem : { IntraMember::TE, IntraMember::TM, IntraMember::TEZ, IntraMember::TMZ,
1494 IntraMember::TEZZ, IntraMember::TMZZ, IntraMember::TES, IntraMember::TMS,
1495 IntraMember::TER, IntraMember::TMR, IntraMember::TERZ, IntraMember::TMRZ })
1496 {
1497 g_currentMember = mem;
1498 for (size_t i = 0; i < numIntSemi.te.size(); i++) {
1499 g_currentI = i;
1500 for (size_t j = 0; j < numIntSemi.te[0].size(); j++) {
1501 g_currentJ = j;
1502 double realPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickRealMember, 0.0, M_PI));
1503 double imagPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickImagMember, 0.0, M_PI));
1504 dcmplx totalVal(realPart, imagPart);
1505 switch (g_currentMember)
1506 {
1507 case IntraMember::TE:
1508 numIntSemi.te[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.te[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1509 case IntraMember::TM:
1510 numIntSemi.tm[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tm[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1511 case IntraMember::TEZ:
1512 numIntSemi.tez[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tez[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1513 case IntraMember::TMZ:
1514 numIntSemi.tmz[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tmz[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1515 case IntraMember::TEZZ:
1516 numIntSemi.tezz[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tezz[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1517 case IntraMember::TMZZ:
1518 numIntSemi.tmzz[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tmzz[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1519 case IntraMember::TES:
1520 numIntSemi.tes[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tes[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1521 case IntraMember::TMS:
1522 numIntSemi.tms[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tms[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1523 case IntraMember::TER:
1524 numIntSemi.ter[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.ter[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1525 case IntraMember::TMR:
1526 numIntSemi.tmr[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tmr[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1527 case IntraMember::TERZ:
1528 numIntSemi.terz[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.terz[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1529 case IntraMember::TMRZ:
1530 numIntSemi.tmrz[i][j] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tmrz[i][j] * std::log(alpha); break;
1531 }
1532 }
1533 }
1534 }
1535
1536 // Real axis integration path
1537 g_memo.clear();
1538 g_Data2D = dataReal2D;
1539 g_path = "real";
1540 if (!g_Data2D.indVecComplex.empty()) {
1541 IntegrandIntra intZeroKrhoReal = numIntSemi.flatten(g_Data2D.indVecComplex);
1542 // Loop over the members of the IntegrandIntra structure
1543 for (IntraMember mem : { IntraMember::TE, IntraMember::TM, IntraMember::TEZ, IntraMember::TMZ,
1544 IntraMember::TEZZ, IntraMember::TMZZ, IntraMember::TES, IntraMember::TMS,
1545 IntraMember::TER, IntraMember::TMR, IntraMember::TERZ, IntraMember::TMRZ }) {
1546 g_currentMember = mem;
1547 for (size_t i = 0; i < g_Data2D.indVecComplex.size(); i++) {
1548 g_currentI = i;
1549 size_t j = 0;
1550 g_currentJ = j;
1551 double realPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickRealMember, 1.0, 0.0));
1552 double imagPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickImagMember, 1.0, 0.0));
1553 dcmplx totalVal(realPart, imagPart);
1554 int row = std::real(g_Data2D.indVecComplex[i]);
1555 int col = std::imag(g_Data2D.indVecComplex[i]);
1556 switch (g_currentMember)
1557 {
1558 case IntraMember::TE:
1559 numIntSemi.te[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.te[i][j] ; break;
1560 case IntraMember::TM:
1561 numIntSemi.tm[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tm[i][j] ; break;
1562 case IntraMember::TEZ:
1563 numIntSemi.tez[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tez[i][j] ; break;
1564 case IntraMember::TMZ:
1565 numIntSemi.tmz[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tmz[i][j] ; break;
1566 case IntraMember::TEZZ:
1567 numIntSemi.tezz[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tezz[i][j]; break;
1568 case IntraMember::TMZZ:
1569 numIntSemi.tmzz[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tmzz[i][j]; break;
1570 case IntraMember::TES:
1571 numIntSemi.tes[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tes[i][j] ; break;
1572 case IntraMember::TMS:
1573 numIntSemi.tms[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tms[i][j] ; break;
1574 case IntraMember::TER:
1575 numIntSemi.ter[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.ter[i][j] ; break;
1576 case IntraMember::TMR:
1577 numIntSemi.tmr[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tmr[i][j] ; break;
1578 case IntraMember::TERZ:
1579 numIntSemi.terz[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.terz[i][j]; break;
1580 case IntraMember::TMRZ:
1581 numIntSemi.tmrz[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tmrz[i][j]; break;
1582 }
1583 }
1584 }
1585 }
1586
1587 // Imaginary axis integration path
1588 g_memo.clear();
1589 g_Data2D = dataImag2D;
1590 g_path = "imag";
1591 if (!g_Data2D.indVecComplex.empty()) {
1592 IntegrandIntra intZeroKrhoImag = numIntSemi.flatten(g_Data2D.indVecComplex);
1593 // Loop over the members of the IntegrandIntra structure
1594 for (IntraMember mem : { IntraMember::TE, IntraMember::TM, IntraMember::TEZ, IntraMember::TMZ,
1595 IntraMember::TEZZ, IntraMember::TMZZ, IntraMember::TES, IntraMember::TMS,
1596 IntraMember::TER, IntraMember::TMR, IntraMember::TERZ, IntraMember::TMRZ }) {
1597 g_currentMember = mem;
1598 for (size_t i = 0; i < g_Data2D.indVecComplex.size(); i++) {
1599 g_currentI = i;
1600 size_t j = 0;
1601 g_currentJ = j;
1602 double realPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickRealMember, 1.0, 0.0));
1603 double imagPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickImagMember, 1.0, 0.0));
1604 dcmplx totalVal(realPart, imagPart);
1605 int row = std::real(g_Data2D.indVecComplex[i]);
1606 int col = std::imag(g_Data2D.indVecComplex[i]);
1607 switch (g_currentMember)
1608 {
1609 case IntraMember::TE:
1610 numIntSemi.te[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.te[i][j] ; break;
1611 case IntraMember::TM:
1612 numIntSemi.tm[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tm[i][j] ; break;
1613 case IntraMember::TEZ:
1614 numIntSemi.tez[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tez[i][j] ; break;
1615 case IntraMember::TMZ:
1616 numIntSemi.tmz[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tmz[i][j] ; break;
1617 case IntraMember::TEZZ:
1618 numIntSemi.tezz[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tezz[i][j]; break;
1619 case IntraMember::TMZZ:
1620 numIntSemi.tmzz[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tmzz[i][j]; break;
1621 case IntraMember::TES:
1622 numIntSemi.tes[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tes[i][j] ; break;
1623 case IntraMember::TMS:
1624 numIntSemi.tms[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tms[i][j] ; break;
1625 case IntraMember::TER:
1626 numIntSemi.ter[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.ter[i][j] ; break;
1627 case IntraMember::TMR:
1628 numIntSemi.tmr[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tmr[i][j] ; break;
1629 case IntraMember::TERZ:
1630 numIntSemi.terz[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.terz[i][j]; break;
1631 case IntraMember::TMRZ:
1632 numIntSemi.tmrz[row][col] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tmrz[i][j]; break;
1633 }
1634 }
1635 }
1636 }
1637#ifdef DEBUG
1638 if (materialIndex == 1) {
1639 writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.te, "te.txt"); writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tm, "tm.txt");
1640 writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tez, "tez.txt"); writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tmz, "tmz.txt");
1641 writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tezz, "tezz.txt"); writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tmzz, "tmzz.txt");
1642 writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tes, "tes.txt"); writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tms, "tms.txt");
1643 writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.ter, "ter.txt"); writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tmr, "tmr.txt");
1644 writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.terz, "terz.txt"); writeMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tmrz, "tmrz.txt");
1645 }
1646#endif
1647 std::vector<double> x = getColumn(r, 0);
1648 std::vector<double> y = z[0];
1649
1650 CoeffsIntra coeffs;
1651 coeffs.te = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.te); coeffs.tm = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.tm);
1652 coeffs.tez = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.tez); coeffs.tmz = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.tmz);
1653 coeffs.tezz = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.tezz); coeffs.tmzz = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.tmzz);
1654 coeffs.tes = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.tes); coeffs.tms = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.tms);
1655 coeffs.ter = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.ter); coeffs.tmr = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.tmr);
1656 coeffs.terz = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.terz); coeffs.tmrz = interpolateIntra(x, y, numIntSemi.tmrz);
1657
1658 return coeffs;
1659 }
1660}
1661
1662// Sommerfeld integral evaluation methods for the inter-layer integrals.
1663CoeffsInter SommerfeldIntegrator::Evaluate(const dcmplx& tq_te, const dcmplx& tq_tm,
1664 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& r,
1665 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& z1,
1666 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& z2,
1667 bool singular, const std::string& op) {
1668 // Validate singular parameter
1669 if (singular == false) {
1670 throw std::invalid_argument("Invalid value for singular parameter. Must be true.");
1671 } else {
1672 // Get the layers wavenumbers
1673 std::vector<dcmplx> k = k_L;
1674
1675 // Material index layer wavenumber
1676 dcmplx k_layer = k[materialIndex];
1677
1678 // Maximum layer real part of wavenumbers
1679 dcmplx temp = *std::max_element(k.begin(), k.end(), [](const dcmplx& a, const dcmplx& b) {
1680 return std::real(a) < std::real(b);
1681 });
1682 double k_max = this->semiReal * std::real(temp);
1683
1684 // Select data for integration paths of semiellipse, and real or imaginary infinity
1685 auto dataSemi3D = selectData3D(r, z1, z2, "semi");
1686 auto dataReal3D = selectData3D(r, z1, z2, "real");
1687 auto dataImag3D = selectData3D(r, z1, z2, "imag");
1688
1689 // Integrand for krho = 0
1690 IntegrandInter intZeroKrho = InterIntegrand(tq_te, tq_tm, dataSemi3D, dcmplx(0.0, 0.0), "bessel");
1691
1692 // alpha parameter for singularity subtraction Chew (Ch.6, A-7)
1693 double alpha = this->cutoff * std::real( k_layer / ( sqrt( this->epsilon[materialIndex] *
1694 this->mu[materialIndex] ) ) );
1695
1696 // Set the global pointers/variables needed by the function:
1697 g_integ = this; g_tq_te = tq_te; g_tq_tm = tq_tm;
1698 g_status = "inter"; g_k_max = k_max; g_op = op;
1699 g_intZeroKrhoInter = intZeroKrho;
1700
1701 // Numerical integration structure to define the size of the numerical integration results and store them
1702 IntegrandInter numIntSemi = integrationFInter(tq_te, tq_tm, dataSemi3D, 0.5, k_max, intZeroKrho, "semi");
1703
1704 // Semi-ellipse integration path
1705 g_memoInter.clear();
1706 g_Data3D = dataSemi3D;
1707 g_path = "semi";
1708
1709 // Before integration loop (allocate expected size)
1710 if (g_memoInter.empty()) g_memoInter.reserve(numIntSemi.te.size() *
1711 numIntSemi.te[0].size() *
1712 numIntSemi.te[0][0].size());
1713
1714 // Loop over the members of the IntegrandInter structure
1715 for (InterMember mem : { InterMember::TE, InterMember::TM, InterMember::TEZ1, InterMember::TMZ1,
1716 InterMember::TEZ2, InterMember::TMZ2, InterMember::TEZZ, InterMember::TMZZ,
1717 InterMember::TES, InterMember::TMS, InterMember::TER, InterMember::TMR,
1718 InterMember::TERZ1, InterMember::TMRZ1, InterMember::TERZ2, InterMember::TMRZ2 })
1719 {
1720 g_currentMemberInter = mem;
1721 for (size_t i = 0; i < numIntSemi.te.size(); i++) {
1722 g_currentI = i;
1723 for (size_t j = 0; j < numIntSemi.te[0].size(); j++) {
1724 g_currentJ = j;
1725 for (size_t k = 0; k < numIntSemi.te[0][0].size(); k++) {
1726 g_currentK = k;
1727 double realPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickRealMember, 0.0, M_PI, 5, 100, 1.0e-8, 1.0e-8));
1728 double imagPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickImagMember, 0.0, M_PI, 5, 100, 1.0e-8, 1.0e-8));
1729 dcmplx totalVal(realPart, imagPart);
1730 switch (g_currentMemberInter)
1731 {
1732 case InterMember::TE:
1733 numIntSemi.te[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.te[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1734 case InterMember::TM:
1735 numIntSemi.tm[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tm[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1736 case InterMember::TEZ1:
1737 numIntSemi.tez1[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tez1[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1738 case InterMember::TMZ1:
1739 numIntSemi.tmz1[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tmz1[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1740 case InterMember::TEZ2:
1741 numIntSemi.tez2[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tez2[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1742 case InterMember::TMZ2:
1743 numIntSemi.tmz2[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tmz2[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1744 case InterMember::TEZZ:
1745 numIntSemi.tezz[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tezz[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1746 case InterMember::TMZZ:
1747 numIntSemi.tmzz[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tmzz[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1748 case InterMember::TES:
1749 numIntSemi.tes[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tes[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1750 case InterMember::TMS:
1751 numIntSemi.tms[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tms[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1752 case InterMember::TER:
1753 numIntSemi.ter[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.ter[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1754 case InterMember::TMR:
1755 numIntSemi.tmr[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tmr[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1756 case InterMember::TERZ1:
1757 numIntSemi.terz1[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.terz1[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1758 case InterMember::TMRZ1:
1759 numIntSemi.tmrz1[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tmrz1[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1760 case InterMember::TERZ2:
1761 numIntSemi.terz2[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.terz2[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1762 case InterMember::TMRZ2:
1763 numIntSemi.tmrz2[i][j][k] = totalVal + intZeroKrho.tmrz2[i][j][k] * std::log(alpha); break;
1764 }
1765 }
1766 }
1767 }
1768 }
1769
1770 // Real axis integration path
1771 g_memoInter.clear();
1772 g_Data3D = dataReal3D;
1773 g_path = "real";
1774 if (g_memoInter.empty()) g_memoInter.reserve(g_Data3D.indVecTriplet.size()); // Before integration loop (expected size)
1775 if (!g_Data3D.indVecTriplet.empty()) {
1776 IntegrandInter intZeroKrhoReal = numIntSemi.flatten(g_Data3D.indVecTriplet);
1777 // Loop over the members of the IntegrandInter structure
1778 for (InterMember mem : { InterMember::TE, InterMember::TM, InterMember::TEZ1, InterMember::TMZ1,
1779 InterMember::TEZ2, InterMember::TMZ2, InterMember::TEZZ, InterMember::TMZZ,
1780 InterMember::TES, InterMember::TMS, InterMember::TER, InterMember::TMR,
1781 InterMember::TERZ1, InterMember::TMRZ1, InterMember::TERZ2, InterMember::TMRZ2 })
1782 {
1783 g_currentMemberInter = mem;
1784 for (size_t i = 0; i < g_Data3D.indVecTriplet.size(); i++) {
1785 g_currentI = i; size_t j = 0; g_currentJ = j; size_t k = 0; g_currentK = k;
1786 double realPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickRealMember, 1.0, 0.0, 5, 100, 1.0e-8, 1.0e-8));
1787 double imagPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickImagMember, 1.0, 0.0, 5, 100, 1.0e-8, 1.0e-8));
1788 dcmplx totalVal(realPart, imagPart);
1789 int row = std::get<0>(g_Data3D.indVecTriplet[i]);
1790 int col = std::get<1>(g_Data3D.indVecTriplet[i]);
1791 int dep = std::get<2>(g_Data3D.indVecTriplet[i]);
1792 switch (g_currentMemberInter)
1793 {
1794 case InterMember::TE:
1795 numIntSemi.te[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.te[i][j][k] ; break;
1796 case InterMember::TM:
1797 numIntSemi.tm[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tm[i][j][k] ; break;
1798 case InterMember::TEZ1:
1799 numIntSemi.tez1[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tez1[i][j][k] ; break;
1800 case InterMember::TMZ1:
1801 numIntSemi.tmz1[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tmz1[i][j][k] ; break;
1802 case InterMember::TEZ2:
1803 numIntSemi.tez2[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tez2[i][j][k] ; break;
1804 case InterMember::TMZ2:
1805 numIntSemi.tmz2[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tmz2[i][j][k] ; break;
1806 case InterMember::TEZZ:
1807 numIntSemi.tezz[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tezz[i][j][k]; break;
1808 case InterMember::TMZZ:
1809 numIntSemi.tmzz[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tmzz[i][j][k]; break;
1810 case InterMember::TES:
1811 numIntSemi.tes[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tes[i][j][k] ; break;
1812 case InterMember::TMS:
1813 numIntSemi.tms[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tms[i][j][k] ; break;
1814 case InterMember::TER:
1815 numIntSemi.ter[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.ter[i][j][k] ; break;
1816 case InterMember::TMR:
1817 numIntSemi.tmr[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tmr[i][j][k] ; break;
1818 case InterMember::TERZ1:
1819 numIntSemi.terz1[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.terz1[i][j][k]; break;
1820 case InterMember::TMRZ1:
1821 numIntSemi.tmrz1[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tmrz1[i][j][k]; break;
1822 case InterMember::TERZ2:
1823 numIntSemi.terz2[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.terz2[i][j][k]; break;
1824 case InterMember::TMRZ2:
1825 numIntSemi.tmrz2[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoReal.tmrz2[i][j][k]; break;
1826 }
1827 }
1828 }
1829 }
1830
1831 // Imaginary axis integration path
1832 g_memoInter.clear();
1833 g_Data3D = dataImag3D;
1834 g_path = "imag";
1835 if (g_memoInter.empty()) g_memoInter.reserve(g_Data3D.indVecTriplet.size()); // Before integration loop (expected size)
1836 if (!g_Data3D.indVecTriplet.empty()) {
1837 IntegrandInter intZeroKrhoImag = numIntSemi.flatten(g_Data3D.indVecTriplet);
1838 // Loop over the members of the IntegrandInter structure
1839 for (InterMember mem : { InterMember::TE, InterMember::TM, InterMember::TEZ1, InterMember::TMZ1,
1840 InterMember::TEZ2, InterMember::TMZ2, InterMember::TEZZ, InterMember::TMZZ,
1841 InterMember::TES, InterMember::TMS, InterMember::TER, InterMember::TMR,
1842 InterMember::TERZ1, InterMember::TMRZ1, InterMember::TERZ2, InterMember::TMRZ2 })
1843 {
1844 g_currentMemberInter = mem;
1845 for (size_t i = 0; i < g_Data3D.indVecTriplet.size(); i++) {
1846 g_currentI = i; size_t j = 0; g_currentJ = j; size_t k = 0; g_currentK = k;
1847 double realPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickRealMember, 1.0, 0.0, 5, 100, 1.0e-8, 1.0e-8));
1848 double imagPart = std::real(gaussKronrod(pickImagMember, 1.0, 0.0, 5, 100, 1.0e-8, 1.0e-8));
1849 dcmplx totalVal(realPart, imagPart);
1850 int row = std::get<0>(g_Data3D.indVecTriplet[i]);
1851 int col = std::get<1>(g_Data3D.indVecTriplet[i]);
1852 int dep = std::get<2>(g_Data3D.indVecTriplet[i]);
1853 switch (g_currentMemberInter)
1854 {
1855 case InterMember::TE:
1856 numIntSemi.te[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.te[i][j][k] ; break;
1857 case InterMember::TM:
1858 numIntSemi.tm[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tm[i][j][k] ; break;
1859 case InterMember::TEZ1:
1860 numIntSemi.tez1[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tez1[i][j][k] ; break;
1861 case InterMember::TMZ1:
1862 numIntSemi.tmz1[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tmz1[i][j][k] ; break;
1863 case InterMember::TEZ2:
1864 numIntSemi.tez2[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tez2[i][j][k] ; break;
1865 case InterMember::TMZ2:
1866 numIntSemi.tmz2[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tmz2[i][j][k] ; break;
1867 case InterMember::TEZZ:
1868 numIntSemi.tezz[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tezz[i][j][k]; break;
1869 case InterMember::TMZZ:
1870 numIntSemi.tmzz[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tmzz[i][j][k]; break;
1871 case InterMember::TES:
1872 numIntSemi.tes[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tes[i][j][k] ; break;
1873 case InterMember::TMS:
1874 numIntSemi.tms[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tms[i][j][k] ; break;
1875 case InterMember::TER:
1876 numIntSemi.ter[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.ter[i][j][k] ; break;
1877 case InterMember::TMR:
1878 numIntSemi.tmr[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tmr[i][j][k] ; break;
1879 case InterMember::TERZ1:
1880 numIntSemi.terz1[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.terz1[i][j][k]; break;
1881 case InterMember::TMRZ1:
1882 numIntSemi.tmrz1[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tmrz1[i][j][k]; break;
1883 case InterMember::TERZ2:
1884 numIntSemi.terz2[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.terz2[i][j][k]; break;
1885 case InterMember::TMRZ2:
1886 numIntSemi.tmrz2[row][col][dep] = totalVal + intZeroKrhoImag.tmrz2[i][j][k]; break;
1887 }
1888 }
1889 }
1890 }
1891
1892#ifdef DEBUG
1893 if (materialIndex == 2 && sourceIndex == 1) {
1894 write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.te, "te.txt"); write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tm, "tm.txt");
1895 write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tez1, "tez1.txt"); write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tmz1, "tmz1.txt");
1896 write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tez2, "tez2.txt"); write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tmz2, "tmz2.txt");
1897 write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tezz, "tezz.txt"); write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tmzz, "tmzz.txt");
1898 write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tes, "tes.txt"); write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tms, "tms.txt");
1899 write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.ter, "ter.txt"); write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tmr, "tmr.txt");
1900 write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.terz1, "terz1.txt"); write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tmrz1, "tmrz1.txt");
1901 write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.terz2, "terz2.txt"); write3DMatrixToFile(numIntSemi.tmrz2, "tmrz2.txt");
1902 }
1903#endif
1904
1905 CoeffsInter coeffs;
1906 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> x = r;
1907 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> y = z1;
1908 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> z = z2;
1909
1910 std::vector<double> xLims = getRowAtColumnDepth(x, 0, 0);
1911 std::vector<double> yLims = getColumnAtRowDepth(y, 0, 0);
1912 std::vector<double> zLims = getDepthAtRowColumn(z, 0, 0);
1913
1914 double xMin = *std::min_element(xLims.begin(), xLims.end());
1915 double xMax = *std::max_element(xLims.begin(), xLims.end());
1916 double yMin = *std::min_element(yLims.begin(), yLims.end());
1917 double yMax = *std::max_element(yLims.begin(), yLims.end());
1918 double zMin = *std::min_element(zLims.begin(), zLims.end());
1919 double zMax = *std::max_element(zLims.begin(), zLims.end());
1920
1921 std::vector<double> margins = {std::abs(xMax - xMin), std::abs(yMax - yMin), std::abs(zMax - zMin)};
1922 double maxScale = *std::max_element(margins.begin(), margins.end());
1923 std::vector<double> scales = {maxScale / margins[0], maxScale / margins[1], maxScale / margins[2]};
1924 coeffs.scales = scales;
1925
1926 coeffs.te = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.te); coeffs.tm = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tm);
1927 coeffs.tez1 = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tez1); coeffs.tmz1 = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tmz1);
1928 coeffs.tez2 = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tez2); coeffs.tmz2 = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tmz2);
1929 coeffs.tezz = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tezz); coeffs.tmzz = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tmzz);
1930 coeffs.tes = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tes); coeffs.tms = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tms);
1931 coeffs.ter = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.ter); coeffs.tmr = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tmr);
1932 coeffs.terz1 = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.terz1); coeffs.tmrz1 = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tmrz1);
1933 coeffs.terz2 = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.terz2); coeffs.tmrz2 = interpolateInter(x, y, z, scales, numIntSemi.tmrz2);
1934
1935 return coeffs;
1936 }
1937}
1938
1939// Interface Fresnel reflection and transmission coefficients (TE or TM).
1940std::vector<dcmplx> SommerfeldIntegrator::FresnelCoeff(int layerIndexI, int layerIndexJ,
1941 dcmplx krho, const std::string& waves) const {
1942
1943 // Validate layer indices
1944 if (layerIndexI < 0 || layerIndexI >= epsilon.size() ||
1945 layerIndexJ < 0 || layerIndexJ >= epsilon.size() ||
1946 std::abs(layerIndexI - layerIndexJ) > 1){
1947 throw std::out_of_range("Invalid layer indeces for Fresnel reflection coefficient calculation.");
1948 }
1949
1950 // Check if the wave type is valid (TE or TM)
1951 if (waves != "TE" && waves != "TM"){
1952 throw std::invalid_argument("Invalid wave type. Use 'TE' or 'TM'.");
1953 }
1954
1955 // Get the permittivity (TM) and permeability (TE) of the two layers
1956 dcmplx pI(0,0);
1957 dcmplx pJ(0,0);
1958 if (waves == "TM"){
1959 pI = epsilon[layerIndexI];
1960 pJ = epsilon[layerIndexJ];
1961 }
1962 else if (waves == "TE"){
1963 pI = mu[layerIndexI];
1964 pJ = mu[layerIndexJ];
1965 }
1966
1967 // z component of the wavevector
1968 dcmplx kIz = k_L[layerIndexI];
1969 dcmplx kJz = k_L[layerIndexJ];
1970 kIz = kIz * kIz - krho * krho; kIz = csqrt(kIz);
1971 kJz = kJz * kJz - krho * krho; kJz = csqrt(kJz);
1972
1973 // Fresnel reflection coefficient
1974 dcmplx fresnelReflCoeff;
1975 fresnelReflCoeff = (pJ * kIz - pI * kJz) /
1976 (pJ * kIz + pI * kJz);
1977
1978 // Fresnel transmission coefficient
1979 dcmplx fresnelTransCoeff;
1980 fresnelTransCoeff = (2.0 * pJ * kIz) / ( pJ * kIz + pI * kJz );
1981
1982 std::vector<dcmplx> fresnelCoeffs = {fresnelReflCoeff, fresnelTransCoeff};
1983
1984 return fresnelCoeffs;
1985}
1986
1987// Write 2D matrix to .txt file for debugging purposes.
1988void SommerfeldIntegrator::writeMatrixToFile(const std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>& matrix, const std::string& filename) {
1989 std::ofstream file(filename);
1990 if (!file) {
1991 std::cerr << "Error opening file: " << filename << std::endl;
1992 return;
1993 }
1994
1995 for (size_t i = 0; i < matrix.size(); i++) {
1996 for (size_t j = 0; j < matrix[i].size(); j++) {
1997 file << i << " " << j << " "
1998 << real(matrix[i][j]) << " " << imag(matrix[i][j]) << "\n";
1999 }
2000 }
2001 file.close();
2002}
2003
2004// Write 3D matrix to .txt file for debugging purposes.
2005void SommerfeldIntegrator::write3DMatrixToFile(const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& matrix, const std::string& filename) {
2006 std::ofstream file(filename);
2007 if (!file) {
2008 std::cerr << "Error opening file: " << filename << std::endl;
2009 return;
2010 }
2011
2012 for (size_t i = 0; i < matrix.size(); i++) {
2013 for (size_t j = 0; j < matrix[i].size(); j++) {
2014 for (size_t k = 0; k < matrix[i][j].size(); k++) {
2015 file << i << " " << j << " " << k << " "
2016 << real(matrix[i][j][k]) << " " << imag(matrix[i][j][k]) << "\n";
2017 }
2018 }
2019 }
2020 file.close();
2021}
